MINI MINUTES: Roy J. Chastain appearing for Department of Personel Administration State of California. Gregg Adams apppearing for plaintiff, CDF Firefighters. Tom Blake appearing for Kathleen Connell State of California Controller. Case to settle soon. Good cause having been shown to the court, it is hereby ordered that this matter be taken off calendar in light of the posture of the case at this time. Settlement conf. and trial date are retained. D. Carter, Clerk; Beldon Yee, CSR. 212.
